title: Razgrom
writer: Nikolai Beresnyov (script), Aleksandr Fadeyev (novel), Yuri Laptev (script)
actors: Victor Yablonsky, Ivan Yudin, Nikolai Khryashchikov, Leonid Klochkov
plot: In 1921. With the help of Japanese interventionists, the White Guards defeat a Shaldyba partisan detachment. The remnants of the defeated detachment pour into Levinson's detachment. ...
